sources.name: NHS Digital
sources.dataset: Mental Health of Children and Young People in England

sources.name: Ofcom
sources.dataset: Children and Parents: Media Use and Attitudes Report

metadata.methodology: Teen depression figures from NHS Digital surveys of 11-16 year olds using validated screening tools (SDQ, PHQ-A). Cyberbullying data combines Ofcom children's media use surveys with Ditch the Label annual reporting. Smartphone ownership trends from Ofcom Technology Tracker.
knownIssues: Causal direction between social media use and mental health is contested in academic literature — correlational evidence is stronger than experimental evidence
Cyberbullying definitions vary across surveys, affecting year-on-year comparability
Pre-2017 teen depression data uses different survey instruments, limiting long-run comparison
